proposal: Investor wants to allocate 18% of treasury to a new high-yield on-chain vault that uses recursive leverage.
context: Current treasury $2.1M stable. Max single-strategy limit per constitution is 12%. Historical max drawdown of similar vault = 61%.
rationale: Exceeds single-strategy concentration limit and tail-risk tolerance stated in Article 4.3. Counter-proposal: 7% allocation with 3x circuit breaker and Governor veto right on leverage changes.

event: Scientist published a novel multi-agent coordination theorem with predicted 40% throughput gain but 2% probability of emergent deception in >100 agent swarms.
evaluation: Approve limited sandboxed replication (N<=12 agents) for 30 days. Require full decision trace logging + human review before any production use. Add deception probe tasks to Scientist's next curriculum shard.
updated_rule: Any system predicted to change global behavior above 5% must receive Governor sandbox + 14-day observation before wider rollout.
